General.Name: China Conch Environment Protection Holdings Limited
General.Description: China Conch Environment Protection Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides treatment solutions for industrial solid and hazardous waste utilizing cement kiln waste treatment technologies in the People's Republic of China. The company offers fly ash, oil sludge, and dry distillation treatment solutions; and municipal sludge disposal solutions. It also provides logistic services for solid and hazardous waste; and resource recycling and technical consultation services. China Conch Environment Protection Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2020 and is headquartered in Wuhu City, China.
